item.title: FITS Blaster 1.21
item.description:
Image viewer controls

  • Added: Zoom slider (0.25x-4x) with live readout; trackpad pinch-to-zoom also supported.
  • Added: Brightness slider for quick exposure adjustment without re-rendering.
  • Added: Stretch slider to boost or reduce image contrast.
  • Added: "Defaults" button to reset all three adjustments in one click.
  • Added: Viewport indicator: a yellow box on the sidebar thumbnail shows which part of the image is currently visible when zoomed in.
  • Improved: Scroll position is preserved when navigating between frames at the same zoom level.
  • Improved: Zooming via the slider keeps the viewport centre fixed instead of jumping to the top-left.

QuickLook support and Bayer screen-door fix (v1.20)

  • Added: QuickLook preview: press Space on any FITS file in Finder to get a rendered preview.
  • Added: QuickLook thumbnails: Finder icon view now shows rendered FITS images as file icons.
  • Fixed: Screen-door grid pattern in colour (debayer) mode for raw Bayer FITS files. Confirmed fixed with Seestar S30, Seestar S30 Pro, Seestar S50, and Dwarf 3.
  • Improved: Universal binary (arm64 + x86_64) — runs natively on both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
